description_long: This object is a pair of round-framed glasses with two large, circular rims connected by a short, straight bridge. The left rim is colored blue while the right rim is red, creating a striking two-tone appearance. The rims are thick and appear to be made from a solid, sturdy material, with no visible lenses or nose pads. The bridge is minimalistic and straight, seamlessly joining the two rims. The temples (arms) are not visible in any of the views, suggesting they may be absent or folded behind the rims. The overall design is simple, bold, and geometric, with a playful color scheme that stands out in an urban environment.
description: A pair of round, thick-rimmed glasses with one blue and one red rim, joined by a straight bridge. The design is bold, simple, and lacks visible temples or lenses.
description_view_0: Front view showing both circular rims, with the left rim blue and the right rim red, connected by a straight bridge.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thickness of the rims and the color transition from blue to red, with the rims appearing as thin lines.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with the rim colors swapped: left rim red, right rim blue.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the thickness of the rims and the color transition from red to blue.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features two large, perfectly round rims with a thick, uniform profile and a full-rim design. The rims are connected by a short, straight bridge, and the overall style is bold and geometric with no visible embellishments or decorative elements.
attribute_lens_tint: No visible lenses are present in the frames; the rims are empty.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, straight bar connecting the two rims directly, with no curvature or additional support features.
attribute_temple_detailing: No temples (arms) are visible in any view, and there are no patterns, engravings, or decorative details present.
